BLACK FRIDAY SALE
STARTS 11TH NOVEMBER
SAVE THE DATE

You asked. We listened. Sale is coming.

It's been 5 long years since our last sale, but that all changes on 11 November.

Start prepping your cart, because you'll want to be among the first 500 customers to order a memobottle.

FREE LIMITED-EDITION DESK STAND
500 UNITS ONLY

Why? Well, aside from some major sitewide savings, our early birds will unlock an exclusive gift: A limited-edition Universal Desk Stand in a brand new colourway that you can't buy anywhere.

Set your alarms — sale starts 8am AEDT!
